lines.speaker: olet
lines.text: Hey there! Pull up a seat.

lines.speaker: olet
lines.text: We've got stories brewing all day.

lines.speaker: olet
lines.text: Don't mind the loud noises please.

lines.speaker: olet
lines.text: We're renovating this week and it's more than a bit loud.

lines.speaker: olet
lines.text: Gotta get back to work. See you around, okay?
The cafe smells like toasted beans and warm sugar.
You wander up a staircase and discover a hidden upstairs bedroom.
You wonder if this is where Olet stays when he's not working downstairs.

lines.speaker: olet
lines.text: Woah, hey! Didn't expect to see you here.
